phrases.cultural_note: Bus stops in rural areas are often near clearly marked road access points.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the salt mine ridge visible
phrases.cultural_note: Viewpoints explicitly list ridge vistas in trail descriptions.

likely_response.translation_en: At the viewpoint above the trail.

responses.english: At the viewpoint above the trail.

phrases.intent_en: How do I validate my bus ticket
phrases.text_local: Wie muss ich mein Busticket entwerten?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket validation machines are standard at bus stops in Austria.

likely_response.local: Entwerten Sie am Automaten beim Bus.
likely_response.translation_en: Validate at the machine by the bus.

responses.english: Validate at the machine by the bus.
responses.french: Entwerten Sie am Automaten beim Bus.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the best panorama viewpoint
phrases.text_local: Wo gibt es den besten Panoramablick?
phrases.cultural_note: Hikers expect clear trail signage and local staff may point along the main route.

likely_response.local: Folgen Sie dem Salzbergweg bis zum Aussichtspunkt.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the Salzberg trail to the viewpoint.

responses.english: Follow the Salzberg trail to the viewpoint.
responses.french: Folgen Sie dem Salzbergweg bis zum Aussichtspunkt.
